channel.title: Agent API Gateway Engineering and Updates
channel.description: Building structured data extraction for AI agents

item.title: Rate limiting strategies for AI agent APIs
item.description: How to design rate limits that protect your infrastructure without breaking agent workflows. Token buckets, sliding windows, and graceful degradation.

item.title: Premium UI redesign, 30% faster loads, and better SEO
item.description: Glassmorphism design system, code-split bundles, lazy-loaded pages, RSS feed, and enhanced meta tags.

item.title: Why AI agents need structured data, not HTML
item.description: Raw HTML parsing is brittle and expensive. Here is how structured extraction APIs solve the reliability problem for agent tool-calling.

item.title: SSRF protection for web extraction APIs
item.description: How we block private hosts, metadata endpoints, and credentialed URLs at every layer of the extraction pipeline.

item.title: Choosing the right extraction schema: product, article, or company
item.description: A guide to the three built-in schemas and when to use each one for your agent workflows.
